must_have_quals: You have start-up DNA: You have demonstrated an ability to thrive in the ambiguity of a dynamic, start-up environment or have the DNA to do so, You have excellent communication skills, You have software development skills, preferably in Python or Go, You are experienced with developing in a public cloud environment, You are experienced with Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, and Linux, You are experienced with building, scaling, and maintaining production systems, You possess a bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a closely related field or 3+ years of equivalent experience

core_responsibilities: Collaborate and work cross-functionally amongst teams are Nuro to align on customer needs, Build high-quality and scalable solutions for infrastructure-as-code, application deployment, production system monitoring, health status tracking, and performance improvements, Build automation to improve developer experience, infrastructure reliability, and security
job_summary: Nuro is a self-driving technology company on a mission to make autonomy accessible to all. They are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join their Infrastructure team, focusing on building scalable solutions and automation to enhance developer experience and infrastructure reliability.
